title: SYRINGE DISPOSAL - 211info
text: MULTNOMAH COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT SYRINGE DISPOSAL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information about safe needle disposal and locations for syringe disposal boxes. 619 NW 6th Avenue Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 988-3674 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 988-3674 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Multnomah County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Community Immunization Clinic is located on the 6th floor Services: Sharps Disposal Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - HIV COMMUNITY TEST SITE HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - STD CLINIC HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - NEEDLE EXCHANGE PUBLIC SAFETY - MEDICATION & FIREARM SAFETY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MULTNOMAH COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT
